name: Flame Bud
text: When this creature deals damage, apply Burn 1. Cannot be sacrificed.

name: Dalguarde Initiate
text: Activatable 1O: Gain Aegis.

name: Blinding Light
text: Deal 3 damage to a creature and Snare it.

name: Novice Shieldmaiden
text: Defender. Activatable 1O: Gain +1 Armor.

name: Denounce
text: Your opponent's next summoned creature gets -2/-2/-2.

name: Dalguarde Fortress
text: Upkeep 1O. Your creatures gain "Summon: gain 1 Armor." When your god takes damage, it takes 1 extra.

name: Cyclops Recruiter
text: Summon: Draw a Cyclops card from your deck.

name: Center of Attention
text: Give a friendly creature +2 Armor and Defender.

name: Lock Down
text: Choose a column. Snare all creatures in it; draw a card for each creature snared.

name: Hunker
text: Your Defenders gain +2 Armor.

name: Discipline
text: Destroy a creature in attack stance.

name: Crystal Warden
text: Defender.

name: Pack Mule
text: Summon: You may return a spell from your graveyard to your hand.

name: Cloud Piercer
text: Pierce. Activatable 2O: Deal 2 Pierce damage to all Snared creatures.

name: Spear Supplier
text: Pierce. Summon: Give a friendly creature Pierce.

name: Cyclops Enforcer
text: Passive: your non-Cyclops creatures cannot attack; your Cyclops gain Forcing.

name: True Form
text: The next creature that damages your god is Obliterated.

name: Light Ray
text: Snare target creature. If it was already Snared, destroy it instead.

name: Time Keeper's Decree
text: The next creature your opponent summons gains Sanctuary (1).

name: Executioner of Valanaar
text: Summon: Destroy a target creature with 4 or less Attack.

name: Grand Council
text: Obliterate the highest-cost creature(s) on the battlefield.

name: The Life Force
text: Crossing: Destroy all creatures.

name: Counterbalance
text: Return all your creatures to defense stance; they regain their armor.

name: Flame Bud Pin
text: Battle Tested: +2 Attack while damaged.

name: Ring Dancer
text: Summon: Adjacent friendly creatures gain Shroud.

name: Scape Goat
text: Summon: Return another friendly creature to your hand.

name: Nameless Wanderer
text: Summon: Nullify an enemy creature.

name: Scorch
text: Apply Burn equal to a target creature's total mana cost.

name: Free From Shackles
text: Choose a friendly creature; destroy a target enemy creature; return the friendly creature to your hand.

name: Coalossus
text: Activatable 1C: Get -2/-2 and summon two 1/1 Flame Buds in adjacent empty slots.

name: Rush Order
text: Rushdown.

name: Bomber
text: At the start of your next turn, destroy Bomber: it deals Cleave damage equal to its Attack to the creature in the facing slot.

name: Sunder
text: Deal 6 Pierce damage to a target creature that has Armor.

name: Snipers Nest
text: Upkeep 2C. Creatures take 1 Pierce damage when they enter the battlefield.

name: Reposition
text: Swap the positions of two friendly creatures.

name: Curse of Callisto
text: Transform a target creature into a 4/4 Bear.

name: Heat Seeking Boulder Tosser
text: Summon: Deal 5 damage to a target Burned creature.

name: The Fire Bringer
text: At the start of your turn, summon two 1/1 Flame Buds in empty slots adjacent to this creature.

name: Cave In
text: Destroy all non-Chaos creatures.

name: Twisting Nether Ledger
text: Upkeep 1C. At the start of your turn draw an extra card; at the end of your turn discard a card.

name: Ember Echo
text: Deal 2 damage to any target. If your hand is empty after casting this, return it to your hand.

name: Hraumella, Rekindled Giantess
text: Summon: Sacrifice all other friendly creatures; apply Burn equal to the number sacrificed to all enemy creatures.

name: Spiteful Spitter
text: Crossing: Deal 1 damage to the enemy's lowest-Health creature(s).

name: Unscathed Chicken
text: If this creature is sacrificed, return it to your hand instead of the graveyard.

name: Phoenix Reborn
text: Sacrifice 1.

name: Brand
text: Apply Burn 3 to a creature.

name: No Strings Attached
text: Until end of turn, you may play Sacrifice cards without sacrificing.

name: Burst Into Flames
text: Immediately trigger all Burn damage (does not reduce Burn values).

name: Rubble
text: Attack and Health equal the number of creatures in your graveyard. At the start of your turn, discard a card.

name: Reckless Vandal
text: Crushing. Crossing: Discard 2 cards.

name: Blindside Blocker
text: Defender. Sacrifice 1. If played in the leftmost or rightmost slot, gain +1 Armor.

name: Shadow Horror
text: Rushdown, Shroud.

name: Siphon
text: Deal damage to the enemy god equal to their untapped crystals.

name: Rekindled Spirit
text: Sacrifice 1. Lifetap.

name: Reap Destruction
text: Restore 2 HP to your god for each creature that died this turn.

name: Locust Swarm
text: When this damages a god, that god's player discards a card.

name: Flamebright Shaman
text: Passive: Burn applications are doubled.

name: Empty Gardens
text: Destroy a target Aura.

name: Corrosive Ooze
text: Summon: Destroy all Armor on all creatures; this takes damage equal to the total Armor removed.

name: Repurpose
text: Obliterate all creatures in your graveyard; restore that much HP to your god.

name: Fields of Corruption
text: Upkeep 2R. Creatures entering the battlefield lose all Armor.

name: Safe Keeping
text: Destroy an enemy creature and put it in YOUR graveyard.

name: Acolyte of the Damned
text: Passive: when any creature dies, restore 2 HP to your god.

name: Fire Breather
text: Activatable 2R: Apply Burn 3 to a target creature.

name: Raging Flame
text: Deal 1 damage, plus 1 per copy of Raging Flame in your graveyard.

name: Bloodcrazed
text: Target creature gains Lifetap and must attack each turn if able.

name: The Shallow
text: Upkeep 1R. At the end of your turn, discard a card then draw a card.

name: Grave Tithe
text: Passive: when a creature is sacrificed, deal 1 damage to the enemy god and restore 1 HP to yours.

name: Vrya's Labyrinth
text: Upkeep 2R. At the start of each player's turn, they discard a card.

name: Famine
text: Each player discards a card for each creature they control.

name: Suspended in Disaster
text: Sacrifice a creature; search your deck for a creature with total cost 2 or more and summon it for free.

name: Cruel Necromancer
text: Summon: Deal Lifetap damage to the enemy god equal to unique creature names in your graveyard. Crossing: Obliterate all creatures in your graveyard.

name: Sacred Vault Guard Hound
text: Cleave. Passive: when a creature dies, gain +2/+2.

name: Blot, Power Hungry Mass
text: At the end of your turn, sacrifice an adjacent creature: gain its stats and Aegis. If you cannot, destroy Blot.

name: Doomfeed Scholar
text: Passive: at the end of your turn draw a card; when you draw a card, your god takes damage equal to its Ruin cost.

name: Vrya's Chains
text: Target creature gets -4/-4.

name: Gravekeeper's Hut
text: Upkeep 1O. When a creature enters a graveyard, its owner draws a card.

name: Underdark Guardian
text: Defender. Crossing: Opponent discards a card.

name: Grave Exchange
text: Sacrifice a target friendly creature, then Reanimate (summon the top creature of your graveyard).

name: Unfinished Business
text: Shuffle a card from your graveyard into your deck; it costs 1O 1R less (minimum 0).

name: Isolate
text: Choose a target creature: destroy the creatures adjacent to it.

name: Obliterating Verdict
text: Obliterate a target creature.

name: Destroy… Rebuild…
text: Destroy all creatures; each player draws a card per creature they controlled that died this way.

name: Sorinoth, Chilling Nightmare
text: Shroud, Cleave. Creatures damaged by this have their Attack reduced to 1.

name: Quartered and Drawn
text: Nullify then destroy a target creature.

name: Field Scorcher
text: Summon: Apply Burn 1 to all other creatures.

name: Best Buds
text: Sacrifice 1: summon three 1/1 Flame Buds in empty slots you choose.

name: Lava Lasher
text: Cleave. When this deals damage to a creature, apply Burn 2 to it.

name: Combust
text: Destroy a Burned creature; apply its Burn value to adjacent creatures.

name: Unstable Explosives
text: Deal 5 damage to BOTH gods.

name: Pyromaniac
text: Passive: when Burn damage is dealt, gain +1 Attack.

name: Aldranari's Wrath
text: Deal 5 damage to all creatures.

name: Cataclysm
text: Upkeep 2C 2R. When you play a card, deal 1 damage to all enemies (creatures and god).
